description: M0 founder vignette layout. Henry Weaver household #22 sits in cluster 8 at hex (0, -1). The 'adjacent forge' here is an artistic placement at (1, -1) for narrative compression — the literal nearest forge in 1865 is cluster 3 (~3 hexes south), which will appear at its real position in M2. The M0 patch is a vignette, not a map fragment.

buildings.note: Compressed for the M0 vignette. The literal nearest forge cluster (3) sits at q=-1, r=2 in M2.
